test.name: TC_01: Create Booking and Verify user can search and find existing booking in Queue Tracking

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.arg: Login To System As Shipping User
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Login To System As Shipping User
New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\Document\\FEMS_AutomationTest\\testsuite\\Shipping\\SHIPPING03_Queue Booking\\output\\browser\\traces\\temp\\6b95bbe7-5fa0-4f12-b987-2b61adf91574"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://uataotfems.netbay.co.th/fems/#/auth/shipping/login
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.name: Set Browser Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'trainingship' in the given field.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Netbay@123' in the given field.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.name: Search Booking In Queue Booking
kw.doc: ค้นหาคิวบุ๊คกิ้งโดยใช้ Booking ID, วันที่ และสถานะ

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '202605080010' in the given field.

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Types the given key combination into element found by ``selector``.

kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Fills the text '2026-05-23' in the given field.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) All by attribute SelectAttribute.label from element xpath=//select[@id="queue-booking-tracking-search-statusId"].

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Booking Is Displayed In Search Result
kw.doc: ตรวจสอบว่าพบ Reference Number นี้ในตารางผลลัพธ์

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//span[contains(@class, "reference-number") and text()="202605080010"] at state visible

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Verify Date To TMO In Search Result
kw.doc: ตรวจสอบว่าวันที่ TMO แสดงผลถูกต้องตรงกับ Booking ID นั้นๆ

kw.name: Convert Date
kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.arg: xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'card-body') and .//span[text()="${target_booking_id}"]]//div[contains(@class, 'card-content') and ./span[text()='Date To TMO'] and contains(., "${ui_date}")]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${locator} = xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'card-body') and .//span[text()="202605080010"]]//div[contains(@class, 'card-content') and ./span[text()='Date To TMO'] and contains(., "23/05/2026")]

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//div[contains(@class, 'card-body') and .//span[text()="202605080010"]]//div[contains(@class, 'card-content') and ./span[text()='Date To TMO'] and contains(., "23/05/2026")] at state visible

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n[INFO] Verified Date To TMO: ${ui_date} for Booking: ${target_booking_id} | Found: ${count}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
